hero_line: From AI assist to async agent work.
supporting_line: A human sets gates and evidence; agent lanes keep safe work moving across turns.

scenes.visual: dark canvas with a single shared goal state node; agent lanes orbit into view
scenes.copy: One shared control plane for long-running agent work.
scenes.motion_notes: fade in the goal node, then pulse two safe lanes without implying live ops data

scenes.visual: many small PR-sized lanes converge into a compact review rail with validation markers
scenes.copy: High-throughput agent work can stay reviewable.
scenes.motion_notes: animate several small lanes into one review rail; avoid raw commit firehoses

scenes.visual: a PR comment becomes a claimed todo, then a repro, fix, validation, and review packet
scenes.copy: Review feedback becomes owned repair work with evidence.
scenes.motion_notes: show claim, repro, fix, validation, and handoff as a short packet sequence

scenes.visual: a broad refactor splits into successor slices while a gated P0 lane pauses and a safe fallback advances
scenes.copy: Large work splits. Blocked routes do not freeze safe progress.
scenes.motion_notes: show supersede/follow-up chips beside a still-visible user gate

scenes.visual: peer lanes claim separate todos against one catalog-backed board
scenes.copy: Multiple agents can share one project memory without guessing each other's state.
scenes.motion_notes: show claims and handoff lines as lightweight beams into shared state

scenes.visual: repo-scale requirement clusters compress into validated commits, docs, smokes, and frontstage surfaces
scenes.copy: Async side work turns repo history into recoverable product momentum.
scenes.motion_notes: avoid raw commit firehoses; use compact clusters and conservative evidence labels

scenes.visual: research, preference memory, and draft material move while publishing remains gated
scenes.copy: The agent can keep researching while human judgment guards what ships.
scenes.motion_notes: animate safe research cards; leave publish decision locked until the final frame

scenes.visual: public showcase catalog badge replaces the live status feed
scenes.copy: Public demos read the showcase catalog, not private control-plane state.
scenes.motion_notes: close on the catalog badge and a clean public/private boundary line
